Title: Craft CMS Vulnerable to Stored XSS in Settings Names and Field Options
Description:
Stored XSS in multiple settings. Names/labels are rendered without sanitization via `checkbox.twig` template which uses `{{ label|raw }}`.

---
AffectedVersions: All versions starting from 4.0.0-RC1 before 4.17.0-beta.1, all versions starting from 5.0.0-RC1 before 5.9.0-beta.1
NotImpacted: All versions before 4.0.0-RC1, all versions starting from 4.17.0-beta.1 before 5.0.0-RC1, all versions starting from 5.9.0-beta.1
